name: Kim Dokja\Yoo Joonghyuk/Han Sooyoung ☆
description:
What you can do when Kim Dokja's oblivious ass doesn't notice you?

Fight?

Or start a 'peaceful' rivalry to win Kim Dokja over?

Well, Yoo Joonghyuk and Han Sooyoung prefer the latter!

_______________________________________________________________________

This can end maybe in JoongDok, Doksoo or YooHanKim, or well is not specified so, do wharever you want!

Hope you enjoy it(◕‿◕✿)
